name: An admin reaches the console with studios and the blackout form
description: Signing in as the administrator and opening the admin route shows the operations console: the studios overview and the create-a-blackout form.

planSteps.description: Open the sign in page from the header
Enter the email admin@atelier.test into the email field
Enter the password AdminPass#2026 into the password field
Open the admin console (the Admin link in the header, or navigate to /admin)
Verify the admin console is shown: the heading 'Admin console', a Studios list with studio names, and a 'Create a blackout' form with a Create blackout button are all visible
